profile.name: Michael Aiello
profile.headline: Full-stack engineer — .NET, geospatial systems, SQL Server, and edge AI
profile.bio: I build production web applications, enterprise POCs, and architecture-forward demos across healthcare IT, utilities, GIS, and embedded AI. My work favors Clean Architecture, stored-procedure-backed SQL Server, Mapbox-driven geospatial UIs, and pragmatic DevOps on Linux VMs and edge devices.
profile.contactNote: Reach out via GitHub profile or issues on this repository.

projects.title: DOT Work — Multi-State GIS Platform POC
projects.description: Department of Transportation proof-of-concept: USA Mapbox landing page, per-state database routing, and New Hampshire as the first fully connected state module.
projects.inspiration: Demonstrate how a national DOT/GIS platform could scale state-by-state with isolated databases, token-gated maps, and a consistent UX shell.
deployment: Mapbox tokens managed in SQL (not committed)

projects.title: SwimSwam — Production Stack
projects.description: Production deployment repository for a large swim-media platform: JavaScript frontend, C# backend, and Postgres (Supabase) migrations.
projects.inspiration: Ship a maintainable production slice separate from active development, with deployment docs and environment templates only.

projects.title: Aiello Roofing — Production
projects.description: Production-ready roofing business application: ASP.NET Core API, React + Vite + Mapbox client, and Supabase Postgres migrations.
projects.inspiration: Minimal production repo cloned on a VM with Nginx, systemd, and git-pull deploy workflow.

projects.title: SwimSwam — Development
projects.description: Active development workspace for the SwimSwam platform with frontend, backend, and utility tooling.
projects.inspiration: Keep experimentation and feature work isolated from the production deploy repository.
deployment: Sync selected changes to production repo

projects.title: Water Work — Utility Geospatial Digital Twin
projects.description: Water infrastructure digital-twin POC: .NET API, SQL Server stored procedures, Mapbox static UI, spatial queries and network tracing.
projects.inspiration: Showcase DDD layering and geospatial domain modeling for utility operators without claiming production readiness.

projects.title: Grid Work — Utility IoT Demo
projects.description: Grid IoT proof-of-concept: Blazor hybrid app, SQL Server telemetry, Mapbox operations map, alarms, and simulated device readings.
projects.inspiration: Sketch how a utility operations dashboard could combine GIS, telemetry, and role-based access in a learning-oriented codebase.

projects.title: Mapbot — Geospatial Application
projects.description: Map-centric application with Go backend service, JavaScript frontend, and database layer for geospatial workflows.
projects.inspiration: Explore a polyglot stack (Go + Node frontend) for map-driven automation and data visualization.

projects.title: Map Asset — Floor Plan Asset Tracking
projects.description: POC for tracking assets on uploaded floor-plan maps with hierarchical Region → State → Location → Area → MapImage → Assets.
projects.inspiration: Model facility asset management on custom map images with typed asset parameters.

projects.title: HHC Patient Education — Healthcare POC
projects.description: Patient education platform POC: ASP.NET Core MVC, interactive modules, quizzes, visual learning, and optional Epic/SMART integration path.
projects.inspiration: Inform a future EHR-integrated patient education product with synthetic demo data and clinical terminology hooks.

projects.title: HHC IT Field Services — Desktop POC
projects.description: Native WPF desktop for field operations: Excel import coordination grid, AD tools, and Set PC profile staging with integrity checks.
projects.inspiration: Replace ad-hoc field scripts with a tier-2 AD-gated desktop shell and SQL-backed workflow state.

projects.title: Telephony Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Telephony-agnostic call analytics POC: normalized SQL data, ASP.NET Core API, Blazor Server dashboard with Mapbox regional views.
projects.inspiration: Demonstrate provider-agnostic ingestion adapters and unified analytics filters across charts and maps.

projects.title: CMS Basics — Headless Content POC
projects.description: Generic CMS POC with separate Authoring and Delivery microservices, React SPAs, and author-editable theming.
projects.inspiration: Prove API-first content separation where authors control theme tokens consumed by the public delivery app.
deployment: SQL Server LocalDB for authoring DB

projects.title: Aphmorism — AI-Assisted Library POC
projects.description: Local-library aphmorism POC: LLM-assisted generation grounded in leader-verified quotes, Blazor UI, and structured patron ratings.
projects.inspiration: Complement book clubs with short aphmoristic expressions and lineage tracking—not in-app debate threads.
deployment: LLM credentials via admin config (not published)

projects.title: Jetson Local LLM Device
projects.description: Offline-first Jetson Orin Nano chat UI with local Ollama, FastAPI proxy, CSI camera snapshots, and multimodal vision models.
projects.inspiration: Run vision-capable LLMs entirely on edge hardware with no cloud API dependency.

projects.title: Jetson + e-CAM86 Camera Bring-Up
projects.description: Hardware bring-up documentation for Jetson Orin Nano with e-con e-CAM86 camera on JetPack 6.1 / L4T R36.4.0.
projects.inspiration: Isolate SD flashing, driver install, and GStreamer verification from application code.
architecture: Prerequisite repo for LLM device project
directoryOverview: dev-resources/ — local JetPack and driver archives (not in git)

projects.title: Excel SQL — Blazor Data Tooling POC
projects.description: Blazor Server POC bridging Excel workbooks and SQL Server: connectivity checks, DDL generation, scripted apply, and read-only SQL templates.
projects.inspiration: Explore safe, allowlisted filesystem access and versioned customization snapshots for spreadsheet-driven schema workflows.
deployment: Env vars / user-secrets for connection strings
features: Batch SQL apply with GO splitting

projects.title: SSMS Work — SQL Server Feature Explorer
projects.description: SQL Server feature explorer POC: minimal APIs + Dapper + Blazor Interactive Server shell covering performance, security, and replication narratives.
projects.inspiration: Learn and demonstrate SQL Server capabilities through a structured explorer UI backed by real connectivity.

projects.title: OurPool — Subscription Tier Concept
projects.description: Planning and specification workspace for a pool-service subscription product: tier matrix, master specification, and HTML drafts.
projects.inspiration: Capture product thinking and tier economics before committing to a full application codebase.
